note: 1st-party deploy manifest. cover = Router V4 (diamond) + Limit Router (Phase 1 yield-core). vePENDLE/sPENDLE/factories/airdrop-distributors/gauge = exclude:deferred-or-infra (follow-up phases). network.* config refs + deployer EOA omitted (external deps, not Pendle contracts). SY/PT/YT/Market are factory-deployed per-market (not in core manifest) — deferred (Curve addresses[] pattern).
